app/globals.css.after:
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@500;600;700&display=swap');
:root{--ink:#202333;--muted:#7c8193;--line:#e8e9ef;--purple:#635bff}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f7f8fb;color:var(--ink);font-family:'DM Sans',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:14px}.shell{min-height:100vh}.topbar{height:72px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 34px}.brand{font:700 21px 'Space Grotesk';display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;color:#252637}.brand-mark{background:var(--purple);color:#fff;border-radius:8px;width:31px;height:31px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:17px}.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:25px;color:#85899a}.workspace-label{font-size:13px}.avatar{background:#e5e3fc;color:#5c53cd;border-radius:50%;width:34px;height:34px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:700;font-size:12px}.layout{display:flex}.sidebar{width:224px;background:#fff;min-height:calc(100vh - 72px);border-right:1px solid var(--line);padding:31px 15px;position:relative}.eyebrow{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.2px;color:#a0a3af;font-weight:700;margin:0 15px 13px}.second{margin-top:40px}nav{display:grid;gap:5px}nav a{height:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;padding:0 15px;color:#7c8090;text-decoration:none;border-radius:7px;font-size:18px}nav a span{font-size:13px;font-weight:500}nav a.active{background:#f0efff;color:var(--purple);font-weight:700}nav b{font-size:11px;margin-left:auto;background:#dfddff;border-radius:10px;padding:2px 7px}.help-card{position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:21px;right:21px;border:1px solid #e9e9f0;border-radius:9px;padding:15px 13px;display:grid;gap:5px}.help-card strong{font-size:12px}.help-card span{font-size:11px;color:#9699a7}.help-card a{position:absolute;right:12px;top:15px;color:var(--purple);text-decoration:none}.content{max-width:1350px;flex:1;padding:38px 44px 60px}.page-heading{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:31px}.breadcrumb{font-size:12px;color:#a0a3af;margin:0 0 13px}.page-heading h1{font:700 31px 'Space Grotesk';letter-spacing:-.8px;margin:0 0 7px}.subtitle{margin:0;color:#818697}.sync-button{border:0;background:var(--purple);color:#fff;padding:12px 17px;border-radius:7px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 3px 7px #635bff33}.sync-button span{font-size:19px;vertical-align:-1px;margin-right:7px}.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:17px;margin-bottom:27px}.stats>div{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:20px 19px;display:flex;gap:14px;min-height:126px}.stat-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:700;font-size:17px}.purple{background:#eeedff;color:#665df3}.green{background:#e6f7ef;color:#15a86a}.amber{background:#fff5df;color:#e49b17}.blue{background:#e6f3ff;color:#428fe1}.stats p{color:#85899a;font-size:12px;margin:1px 0 8px}.stats strong{font:700 24px 'Space Grotesk';display:block}.stats small{color:#19a56d;font-size:10px;margin-top:7px;display:block}.stats em{font-style:normal;color:#9a9dab;margin-left:4px}.stats small.neutral{color:#d79a27}.catalog-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;overflow:hidden}.card-toolbar{min-height:90px;padding:19px 21px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.card-toolbar h2{font:600 16px 'Space Grotesk';margin:0 0 5px}.card-toolbar h2 span{font:500 11px 'DM Sans';background:#f0efff;color:#6259dc;border-radius:10px;padding:3px 7px;margin-left:5px}.card-toolbar p{color:#9599a8;font-size:11px;margin:0}.tools{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center}.search{height:35px;width:194px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:6px;color:#9a9ead;padding:0 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;font-size:20px}.search input{border:0;outline:0;width:100%;padding-left:7px;font:12px 'DM Sans'}.filter,.more{height:35px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:6px;color:#646879;font-size:12px;padding:0 12px}.filter span{background:#efedff;color:#635bff;border-radius:8px;padding:2px 5px;margin-left:4px}.more{font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;padding:0 10px}.table-wrap{overflow-x:auto}table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;min-width:920px}th{text-align:left;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.5px;color:#979aa8;font-weight:600;background:#fafafd;height:39px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}th:first-child,td:first-child{padding-left:21px;width:45px}td{height:65px;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f4;font-size:12px}th input,td input{accent-color:var(--purple)}.product{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}.product strong{font-weight:600}.product-image{height:34px;width:34px;border-radius:7px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6565d7,#b4a9ee)}.image-2{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#273844,#6995a5)}.image-3{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a5e79,#b7d3ee)}.image-4{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#20232c,#767a84)}.image-5{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c99346,#f0d49d)}.image-6{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d67952,#efb78d)}.muted{color:#85899a}.pill{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;border-radius:12px;padding:5px 9px}.in-stock{background:#e7f7ef;color:#169d65}.low-stock{background:#fff4dd;color:#d49418}.out-of-stock{background:#fce9ec;color:#d35b68}.row-more{border:0;background:transparent;color:#8e92a0;letter-spacing:2px;font-weight:bold}.pagination{height:65px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 21px;color:#9296a4;font-size:11px}.pagination strong{color:#555a6b}.pagination button{border:0;background:#fff;color:#a1a4af;margin-left:8px;font-size:11px}.pagination .current{background:#eeedff;color:#6259e6;border-radius:5px;padding:7px 10px}button{font-family:inherit}@media(max-width:900px){.sidebar{display:none}.content{padding:28px 18px}.stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.page-heading{align-items:flex-start;gap:20px}.tools{flex-wrap:wrap}.card-toolbar{align-items:flex-start;gap:15px;flex-direction:column}}@media(max-width:560px){.stats{grid-template-columns:1fr}.topbar{padding:0 18px}.workspace-label{display:none}.page-heading{flex-direction:column}.sync-button{align-self:stretch}.content{padding-top:24px}}
